dialogos.texto_en: Ah! I've seen this gate in a book before!
This is Shureimon, isn't it?
Yes, that's right! As I thought,\nthis is where we should start.\nIt really feels like we've come to Okinawa.
So, this is the entrance to Shuri Castle?
That's right.\nIt's like the 'otemon' of Shuri Castle,\nso you could say that.
The 'otemon'?
That's like the main gate of a Japanese castle.
As you would know, Miku.\nDo you know the meaning of 'Shurei'?
Mm...\nI don't know that.
Since it's a 'protective' gate,\nmaybe it means a gate where you can not pass!\nOr, something like that?
No, 'Shurei' means to 'value courtesy and etiquette.'\nIn other words, this Shureimon Gate represents the\nimportance that the Ryukyu Kingdom placed on etiquette%p-2;――
H-huhhh?
When I listen to your explanation, big bro,\nit's like I'm attending a lecture.
Ooh...!
Futaro, you still give the feeling of being a tutor.
Since we're on a trip,\nlet's avoid difficult topics, okay, Fu-kun?
No, no, gaining this kind of knowledge\nis also part of the joy of traveling!
But that's exactly it, isn't it?\nI like hearing Futaro-kun's stories.
!...\nIs that so...?
Teehee!
Hey, Itsuki-chan, why are you laughing?\nDid I say something weird?
Not really?
You just said something embarrassing.
Ehhh?\nDid I? Ahaha...
H-hey, let's move on.\nThere are many other sights to see at Shuri Castle!
Okaaay!
What is this?!\nThere're gates no matter how far we go!
Ah! Is this a trap?!\nMaybe we're just going around in circles\nin the same place?!
Look carefully, the design is different.
That's just how castles are designed.\nThey're made to prevent enemies from easily entering.
...Hey, Futaro-kun?\nWhat's wrong? You're a little behind.
A-ah!\nI'm fine, I'm following you.
Are you now?
What's going on?\nIt seems like you've been following me from behind for a while.
Huh?!\nNo, I didn't intend to do that...
Teehee, shall I guess what you're thinking, Futaro-kun?
Wha...
You don't have to act weird.\nYou want to walk beside me, don't you?
Oo...\nHow do you know...?
And, that is...
Because I'm your girlfriend.
(...Damn, I can't stand up to her.)
Just kidding! I also want to be beside you.\nIf you didn't come, Futaro-kun,\nI would have gone to you.
I-I see...
Did you see that, Yotsuba-san?\nIt looked like a scene from a drama just now!
Oh my, this does put a smile on my face!
...I can hear you guys.
Oops, we apologize for that!
You're not doing bad, big bro.\nStanding next to Ichika-san will get\nyour boyfriend points up.
What the hell are those? Boyfriend points?
I'll agree with them.\nYour boyfriend points have gone way up.
Y-you too, Ichika!
Yeah, yeah, keep the volume down guys.
Futaro, think about the time and place.
For real.
Why am I being blamed?!
Wow...\nIt's beautiful...
Ahh, how impressive.\nThis is the main hall of Shuri Castle.
The image I had in mind when I heard 'castle'\nis quite different from this.
Yes, you can feel the difference in culture.
By the way, there are various types of Japanese castles.\nThe castles with the so-called tenshu\nthat appear in historical dramas%p-2;――
Fu-kun.
Aaah, you got scolded.
Gghn...
Uesugi-san, Uesugi-san!\nLet's take a commemorative photo here!
Sure, I'll be the photographer%p-2;――
No, no, let's take a two-shot with you and Ichika\nsince we have the chance.
Huh?
With Ichika?\nNo, but...
It's okay, right?\nIt will make for a lovely picture.
W-well...\nIf you guys say so...
I'm happy about it, but I want to\ntake a picture with everyone. After all, this trip\nis about making memories with everybody.
Ah, but of course, I want to take a picture with\nFutaro-kun too.\nThanks in advance.
Okay, got it!\nLeave it to me.
(Since...coming to Okinawa, no,\n ever since planning this trip, I've only been thinking\n about Ichika.)
(But this trip is about making memories with everyone,\n including me and Raiha,\n and creating memories for the quintuplets.)
(And yet, I%p-2;――%p;)
WOAAAAH...!!
WAH?!\nYou suddenly started writhing, are you okay?
It's nothing...
It doesn't seem like that, though.
It's really nothing.\nI just suddenly felt like wriggling.
...Um, are you really okay?
I'm reflecting on something.
Why are you doing that?
That's just how life is, right?\nFailure only has meaning if you learn from it\nand move forward to the next thing.
...Um, isn't the conversation getting off track?
Sorry...\nAnyway, I'll use my introspection,\nand make this trip even better!
Okay, I don't really understand,\nbut I appreciate your enthusiasm.
I think it's as you say.\nLet's make lots of memories together.
Yeah.\nIf we take photos, we can look back at our trip.
...Hey, don't get me wrong.\nI'm not trying to say that my memories of you don't matter or \nanything like that at all.
I know that.\nI...wouldn't dare compare you and Raiha, either.
I see.\nTeehee, thank you.
If it's going to be all of us,\nthen we'll have to entrust someone\nwith the camera, won't we?
Well then, I'll go ask someone!
Well, while Yotsuba is trying to find someone to take a \npicture of us, shall we take a two-shot\nof Ichika and Uesugi-kun?
Yeah, thanks, Itsuki-chan.
